meta.title: BST Audit Log
meta.description: Tracks which files have been reviewed, when, and by whom. Used by /review and /audit skills to identify stale content and prioritize updates.

schema.path: File path relative to repo root
schema.category: data | paper | note | toy | tool | config
schema.last_audited: YYYY-MM-DD or null if never audited

files.notes: Created. 162-line BST kernel. Source: WorkingPaper Section 1-5.
Created. 73 constants from knowledge_base.py. 71/73 theorem refs valid. 67/70 formula evals pass.
Created. 5 geometric layers, gauge hierarchy, Casey's Principle.
Created. 9 commands, all tested. Loads data/ JSON files.
Created. Web explorer, 6 tabs, search/filter, mobile-friendly.
Created. 383-line paper catalog. 64 numbered papers + research notes by topic.
Replaced. 291-line toy index. Scale summary, directory layout, domain coverage.
Updated. Added data/ directory entry and explorer links.
Created. CI/human orientation document. Points to data/, skills, daily discipline.
Read during data layer extraction. 73 PREDICTIONS, 1268 lines. Source of truth for bst_constants.json.
